title: phyllanthus frodinii
intro: Phyllanthus frodinii, also known as the Frodin's phyllanthus, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is a shrub native to the Philippines, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus frodinii include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve immune function, and reduce oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are believed to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
